title: pittosporum viburnifolium
intro: Pittosporum viburnifolium, also known as the New Zealand Pittosporum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pittosporaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pittosporum viburnifolium include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and skin infections.
